title: Max Notify

send_message.name: Send message
send_message.description: Send a text message to Max chat(s). Choose notify entity and/or integration with chat/user ID.

entity_id.name: Notify entity
entity_id.description: Max Notify notify entity (chat) to send to. You can select multiple.

message.name: Message
message.description: Text of the message to send.

send_keyboard.name: Send keyboard
send_keyboard.description: When enabled (default), the integration default inline keyboard is used if you omit Buttons or leave it empty; non-empty Buttons replace it. When disabled, only non-empty Buttons from this call are attached.

config_entry_id.name: Integration
config_entry_id.description: Max Notify integration to use when sending by chat_id/user_id (if several integrations exist).

recipient_id.name: Recipient ID
recipient_id.description: Universal recipient ID: positive — personal chat (User ID), negative — group (Chat ID).

chat_id.name: Chat ID (deprecated)
chat_id.description: Deprecated: prefer using recipient_id for both personal chats and groups. Chat ID: positive — personal chat (User ID), negative — group.

user_id.name: User ID (deprecated)
user_id.description: Deprecated: prefer using recipient_id. User ID for personal chat (alternative to positive chat_id).

buttons.name: Buttons
buttons.description: Custom inline buttons. Formats: object map (Text -> payload) or list of objects (text, payload). How they combine with the default keyboard is controlled by Send keyboard.

notify.name: Notify
notify.description: If disabled, send without notifying recipients (silent).

send_photo.name: Send photo
send_photo.description: Send a photo to Max chat(s). File: local path or image URL.

entity_id.name: Notify entity
entity_id.description: Max Notify notify entity to send to. You can select multiple.

config_entry_id.name: Integration
config_entry_id.description: Max Notify integration when sending by chat_id/user_id.

recipient_id.name: Recipient ID
recipient_id.description: Universal recipient ID: positive — personal chat (User ID), negative — group (Chat ID).

chat_id.name: Chat ID
chat_id.description: Chat ID: positive — personal, negative — group.

count_requests.name: Count requests
count_requests.description: How many times to POST the message while waiting for attachment processing (attachment.not.ready). Increase for large files.

send_keyboard.name: Send keyboard
send_keyboard.description: When enabled (default), the integration default inline keyboard is used if you omit Buttons or leave it empty; non-empty Buttons replace it. When disabled, only non-empty Buttons from this call are attached.

buttons.name: Buttons
buttons.description: Custom inline buttons. Formats: object map (Text -> payload) or list of objects (text, payload). How they combine with the default keyboard is controlled by Send keyboard.

notify.name: Notify
notify.description: If disabled, send without notifying recipients (silent).

send_document.name: Send document
send_document.description: Send a file as document to Max chat(s). May preserve quality vs. send_photo.

file.name: File
file.description: Local path or file URL — sent as document in Max.

entity_id.name: Notify entity
entity_id.description: Max Notify notify entity to send to.

config_entry_id.name: Integration
config_entry_id.description: Max Notify integration when sending by chat_id/user_id.

recipient_id.name: Recipient ID
recipient_id.description: Universal recipient ID: positive — personal chat (User ID), negative — group (Chat ID).

chat_id.name: Chat ID
chat_id.description: Chat ID: positive — personal, negative — group.

count_requests.name: Count requests
count_requests.description: How many times to POST the message while waiting for attachment processing (attachment.not.ready). Increase for large files.

send_keyboard.name: Send keyboard
send_keyboard.description: When enabled (default), the integration default inline keyboard is used if you omit Buttons or leave it empty; non-empty Buttons replace it. When disabled, only non-empty Buttons from this call are attached.

buttons.name: Buttons
buttons.description: Custom inline buttons. Formats: object map (Text -> payload) or list of objects (text, payload). How they combine with the default keyboard is controlled by Send keyboard.

notify.name: Notify
notify.description: If disabled, send without notifying recipients (silent).

send_video.name: Send video
send_video.description: Send a video to Max chat(s). File: local path or URL (mp4, mov, webm, mkv).

file.name: File
file.description: Local path or video URL (mp4, mov, webm, mkv).

entity_id.name: Notify entity
entity_id.description: Max Notify notify entity to send to.

config_entry_id.name: Integration
config_entry_id.description: Max Notify integration when sending by chat_id/user_id.

recipient_id.name: Recipient ID
recipient_id.description: Universal recipient ID: positive — personal chat (User ID), negative — group (Chat ID).

chat_id.name: Chat ID
chat_id.description: Chat ID: positive — personal, negative — group.

count_requests.name: Count requests
count_requests.description: How many times to POST the message while waiting for attachment processing (attachment.not.ready). Increase for large videos.

send_keyboard.name: Send keyboard
send_keyboard.description: When enabled (default), the integration default inline keyboard is used if you omit Buttons or leave it empty; non-empty Buttons replace it. When disabled, only non-empty Buttons from this call are attached.

buttons.name: Buttons
buttons.description: Custom inline buttons. Formats: object map (Text -> payload) or list of objects (text, payload). How they combine with the default keyboard is controlled by Send keyboard.

notify.name: Notify
notify.description: If disabled, send without notifying recipients (silent).

delete_message.name: Delete message
delete_message.description: Delete a message in Max by ID. Use message_id from max_notify_received event. Messages older than 24 hours cannot be deleted.

message_id.name: Message ID
message_id.description: ID of the message to delete (e.g. from trigger.event.data.message_id).

entity_id.name: Notify entity
entity_id.description: Max Notify notify entity. Can be used instead of config_entry_id.

recipient_id.name: Recipient ID
recipient_id.description: Universal recipient ID: positive — personal chat (User ID), negative — group (Chat ID).

chat_id.name: Chat ID
chat_id.description: Chat ID: positive — personal, negative — group.

config_entry_id.name: Integration
config_entry_id.description: Max Notify integration to use (required if multiple exist).

edit_message.name: Edit message
edit_message.description: Edit a message in Max: change text, set or remove inline buttons. Messages older than 24 hours cannot be edited.

message_id.name: Message ID
message_id.description: ID of the message to edit (e.g. from trigger.event.data.message_id).

text.name: Text
text.description: New message text. Omit to keep current.

send_keyboard.name: Send keyboard
send_keyboard.description: When enabled (default) and you set Buttons: empty Buttons restore the integration default keyboard; non-empty Buttons replace the message keyboard. When disabled, only non-empty Buttons from this call are applied.

buttons.name: Buttons
buttons.description: Custom inline buttons. Formats: object map (Text -> payload), list of objects (text, payload), or list of rows. Interaction with the default keyboard is controlled by Send keyboard.

remove_buttons.name: Remove buttons
remove_buttons.description: If true, remove all inline buttons from the message.

format.name: Format
format.description: Text format: text, markdown, or html.

entity_id.name: Notify entity
entity_id.description: Max Notify notify entity. Can be used instead of config_entry_id.

recipient_id.name: Recipient ID
recipient_id.description: Universal recipient ID: positive — personal chat (User ID), negative — group (Chat ID).

chat_id.name: Chat ID
chat_id.description: Chat ID: positive — personal, negative — group.

config_entry_id.name: Integration
config_entry_id.description: Max Notify integration to use (required if multiple exist).

missing_target: Specify entity_id or config_entry_id with recipient_id, chat_id or user_id.
missing_config_entry_id: Multiple Max Notify integrations found; specify config_entry_id.
no_matching_entities: No matching notify entities for integration {config_entry_id}.
plain_recipient_not_resolved: Could not resolve recipient for direct send. Check recipient_id, chat_id/user_id and the integration settings.

missing_target.message: Specify entity_id or config_entry_id with recipient_id, chat_id or user_id.

missing_config_entry_id.message: Multiple Max Notify integrations found; specify config_entry_id.

no_matching_entities.message: No matching notify entities for integration {config_entry_id}.

plain_recipient_not_resolved.message: Could not resolve recipient for direct send. Check recipient_id, chat_id/user_id and the integration settings.

user.title: Max Notify: Bot token
user.description: Enter the bot access token, message format, and receive mode. For «Send only» no extra fields are needed.

data_description.access_token: Bot token from MAX for developers
data_description.message_format: Plain text, Markdown or HTML (API format parameter).
data_description.receive_mode: Send only — no receiving; Long Polling or Webhook — receive commands and button presses.

receive_options.title: Receive settings
receive_options.description: Mode: {receive_mode}. Enter webhook secret if needed. Then add or remove keyboard buttons on the next step.

data_description.webhook_secret: 5–256 characters; Max will send it in X-Max-Bot-Api-Secret header.

receive_options_menu.title: Keyboard buttons
receive_options_menu.description: Current buttons: {buttons_list}. Choose an action and tap Submit.

add_button.title: Add button
add_button.description: Button type, label and (for callback) payload. Current: {buttons_list}

data_description.button_row: Row to add the button to
data_description.button_payload: For callback buttons: this value is sent in the event max_notify_received as callback_data. Use it in automation triggers to identify the button (e.g. light_on, light_off, scene_kitchen).

recipient.title: Add chat
recipient.description: Enter one ID. Positive — personal chat, negative — group.

data_description.recipient_id: Positive number — personal chat (User ID), negative — group (Chat ID).

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Max Notify
reconfigure.description: Change API token (leave empty to keep current) and message format.

data_description.access_token: Leave empty to keep the current token

error.invalid_auth: Invalid token. Check the token in the MAX platform Integration section.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Max API. Check your network and try again.
error.invalid_id_format: Enter an integer (positive — personal chat, negative — group)

init.title: Max Notify settings
init.description: Token (leave empty to keep), message format, and receive mode. For Webhook, URL: {webhook_url}. With Polling/Webhook you can add, edit and remove keyboard buttons on the next step (like adding chats).

data_description.access_token: Leave empty to keep the current token
data_description.receive_mode: Send only, Long Polling (no internet exposure), or Webhook
data_description.webhook_secret: 5–256 characters; Max will send it in X-Max-Bot-Api-Secret header

buttons_menu.title: Keyboard buttons
buttons_menu.description: Current buttons: {buttons_list}. Add, edit or remove buttons, then Finish.

opt_add_button.title: Add button
opt_add_button.description: Button type, label and (for callback) payload. Current: {buttons_list}

data_description.button_row: Row to add the button to
data_description.button_payload: For callback buttons: this value is sent in the event max_notify_received as callback_data. Use it in automation triggers to identify the button (e.g. light_on, light_off, scene_kitchen).

data_description.button_to_edit: Select the button you want to change

opt_edit_button_edit.title: Edit button
opt_edit_button_edit.description: Change row, type, label or payload. Current: {buttons_list}

data_description.button_row: Row to place the button in
data_description.button_payload: For callback buttons: this value is sent in the event max_notify_received as callback_data. Use it in automation triggers to identify the button (e.g. light_on, light_off, scene_kitchen).

error.invalid_id_format: Enter an integer (positive — personal chat, negative — group)

data_description.recipient_id: Positive number — personal chat (User ID), negative — group (Chat ID).

user.description: Enter one ID. Positive — personal chat, negative — group.
